title: Fixed Sidebar with Flexible Content
description: Create a sidebar (250px) that doesn't shrink and a flexible content area.

title: Shrink Proportionally
description: Create 4 items with basis 150px in a 400px container. Item 2 has shrink: 3, others have shrink: 1. Show the proportional shrinking.
hint: Higher shrink = shrinks more. Use `flex: 0 3 150px` for item 2.
